TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Based on the Type1 Dimension's natural key and the DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, this lookup transformation is used to look for the corresponding surrogate key to be used as a foreign key in the fact/dimension table. For the incremental-load session, this lookup SQL will have an override joining with the staging area table on the Type1 Dimension's natural key column as well as the DATASOURCE_NUM_ID. This will restrict the cache being created for the Type1 dimension natural keys which have appeared in the current staging area records, and improve the overall performance.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: LKP_W_EMP_DEMOGRAPHICS_D

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT LOOKUP_TABLE.ROW_WID as ROW_WID, LOOKUP_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, LOOKUP_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID as INTEGRATION_ID FROM W_EMP_DEMOGRAPHICS_D LOOKUP_TABLE

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: BASE_POSTN_ID = IN_BASE_POSTN_ID AND DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = IN_DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT <= IN_TRANSACTION_DT AND EFFECTIVE_TO_DT > IN_TRANSACTION_DT

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Based on the Type2 Dimension's natural key, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID and a given date, this lookup transformation is used to look for the corresponding surrogate key to be used as a foreign key in the fact/dimension table. For the incremental-load session, this lookup SQL will have an override joining with the staging area table on the Type2 Dimension's natural key column as well as the DATASOURCE_NUM_ID. This will restrict the cache being created for the Type2 dimension natural keys which have appeared in the current staging area records, and improve the overall performance.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: LKP_W_USER_D

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT LOOKUP_TABLE.ROW_WID as ROW_WID, LOOKUP_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, LOOKUP_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID as INTEGRATION_ID, LOOKUP_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT as EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT, LOOKUP_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT as EFFECTIVE_TO_DT FROM W_USER_D LOOKUP_TABLE

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = IN_DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND INTEGRATION_ID = IN_INTEGRATION_ID AND EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT <= IN_DATE AND EFFECTIVE_TO_DT >= IN_DATE

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: This sequence generator transformation is used to generate surrogate keys for the table W_EMPLOYEE_D. This is a reusable transformation and should be used for every source system adapters in order to ensure unique keys across the source system adapters like Oracle Applications, SAP, PeopleSoft and so on.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: Seq_W_EMPLOYEE_D_Wid

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: This is a reusable expression transformation to be used by all Type2 dimension load mappings. Given inputs like Update Flag value, the Next value from Sequence Generator, Source-side effectivity information, value of Delete flag of existing record and a few more system columns from the target table, it gives back the right effective start and end date and the right value of current flag along with other system columns to be used in the target table.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: EXP_SCD2_DATES_EMP

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: GREATEST ( DECODE(INP_AUX1_CHANGED_ON_DT, NULL, TO_DATE('01-JAN-1899','DD-MON-YYYY'), INP_AUX1_CHANGED_ON_DT), DECODE(INP_AUX2_CHANGED_ON_DT, NULL, TO_DATE('01-JAN-1899','DD-MON-YYYY'), INP_AUX2_CHANGED_ON_DT), DECODE(INP_AUX3_CHANGED_ON_DT, NULL, TO_DATE('01-JAN-1899','DD-MON-YYYY'), INP_AUX3_CHANGED_ON_DT), DECODE(INP_AUX4_CHANGED_ON_DT, NULL, TO_DATE('01-JAN-1899','DD-MON-YYYY'), INP_AUX4_CHANGED_ON_DT) )
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: LATEST_AUX_DATE_VAR

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: GREATEST ( DECODE(INP_CHANGED_ON_DT, NULL, TO_DATE('01-JAN-1899','DD-MON-YYYY'), INP_CHANGED_ON_DT), LATEST_AUX_DATE_VAR )
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: INP_CHANGED_ON_DT_VAR

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(INP_SRC_EFF_TO_DT), DEFAULT_EFF_TO_DATE, IIF(INP_SRC_EFF_FROM_DT > INP_SRC_EFF_TO_DT, DEFAULT_EFF_TO_DATE, INP_SRC_EFF_TO_DT))
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: EXT_EFFECTIVE_TO_DT

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(INP_UPDATE_FLG = 'D', IIF(EXT_EFFECTIVE_TO_DT = DEFAULT_EFF_TO_DATE, IIF(ISNULL(INP_DELETED_ON_DT),SESSSTARTTIME, INP_DELETED_ON_DT),EXT_EFFECTIVE_TO_DT), IIF(INP_UPDATE_FLG = 'U', IIF(ISNULL(INP_CHANGED_ON_DT_VAR),SESSSTARTTIME, INP_CHANGED_ON_DT_VAR), IIF(INP_UPDATE_FLG = 'S', IIF(ISNULL(INP_CHANGED_ON_DT_VAR),SESSSTARTTIME, INP_CHANGED_ON_DT_VAR),NULL)))
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: SCD_VAR

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(INP_UPDATE_FLG = 'S', IIF(INP_OLD_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT < SCD_VAR, IIF(SCD_VAR < EXT_EFFECTIVE_TO_DT,'S', 'U'), 'U'), INP_UPDATE_FLG)
TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION_DESCRIPTION: IIF(UPDATE_FLAG = 'S', IIF(EXT_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT = DEFAULT_EFF_FROM_DATE, IIF(OD_CURR_EFF_FROM_DT < SCD_VAR, IIF(SCD_VAR < EXT_EFFECTIVE_TO_DT,'S','U'),'U'),'U'), UPDATE_FLAG)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: UPDATE_FLAG_VAR

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION:
IIF(UPDATE_FLAG_VAR = 'I' OR UPDATE_FLAG_VAR = 'B' , IIF(EXT_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT = DEFAULT_EFF_FROM_DATE, TO_DATE('01-JAN-1899','DD-MON-YYYY'),EXT_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT),
IIF(UPDATE_FLAG_VAR = 'S', IIF(ISNULL(INP_CHANGED_ON_DT_VAR),SESSSTARTTIME,EXT_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT),
IIF(UPDATE_FLAG_VAR = 'U' OR UPDATE_FLAG_VAR = 'D', --INP_OLD_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT, EXT_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT, NULL)))
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION:
IIF(UPDATE_FLAG_VAR = 'I' OR UPDATE_FLAG_VAR = 'S', HI_DATE_VAR,
IIF(UPDATE_FLAG_VAR = 'B', IIF(EXT_EFFECTIVE_TO_DT = DEFAULT_EFF_TO_DATE, IIF(ISNULL(INP_DELETED_ON_DT),SESSSTARTTIME,INP_DELETED_ON_DT), EXT_EFFECTIVE_TO_DT),
IIF(UPDATE_FLAG_VAR= 'U' OR UPDATE_FLAG_VAR = 'D', --IIF(INP_OLD_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT < HI_DATE_VAR,HI_DATE_VAR, INP_OLD_EFFECTIVE_TO_DT), EXT_EFFECTIVE_TO_DT, NULL)))
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: EFFECTIVE_TO_DT

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(UPDATE_FLAG_VAR = 'I' OR UPDATE_FLAG_VAR = 'B' OR UPDATE_FLAG_VAR = 'S', SESSSTARTTIME, IIF(UPDATE_FLAG_VAR = 'U' OR UPDATE_FLAG_VAR = 'D', INP_OLD_W_INSERT_DT,NULL))
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: W_INSERT_DT

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(UPDATE_FLAG_VAR = 'I' OR UPDATE_FLAG_VAR = 'B' OR UPDATE_FLAG_VAR = 'S' OR UPDATE_FLAG_VAR = 'U' OR UPDATE_FLAG_VAR = 'D', SESSSTARTTIME,NULL)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: W_UPDATE_DT

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Looks up W_PARAM_G for the ETL_PROC_WID
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: LKP_W_PARAM_G_Get_ETL_PROC_WID

MAPPLET.DESCRIPTION: This mapplet is responsible for transforming specific types of columns in the table W_EMPLOYEE_D. Jobs done here include Code-Name pair resolution, Dimension Surrogate Key generation, Handling the effective dates for slowly changing dimensions, System Columns generation and so on.
MAPPLET.NAME: mplt_SIL_EmployeeDimension

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: This expression transformation acts as a staging area to receive the ports from the previous mapplet input transformation. In order to send the same port (like DATASOURCE_NUM_ID) into more than one transformation at the same time (like lookups etc) downstream in the mapping, the starting point cannot be a mapplet input transformation. This is the primary reason we have this expression transformation at this position.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: Exp_W_EMPLOYEE_D_Validate

MAPPING.DESCRIPTION: This mapping is responsible for loading dimension records for the table W_EMPLOYEE_D based on the corresponding staging area table. This mapping takes care of inserting new records as well as updating existing records in the target table. On a requirement basis, this mapping also 'soft-deletes' records from the target table (meaning, marking a record as 'Deleted' instead of physically deleting them)..
MAPPING.NAME: SIL_EmployeeDimension

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: This Update Strategy transformation is the place where actions are taken based on the value of the Update Flag, whether to Insert or Update the record into the datawarehouse. If the Update Flag is (I or B or S), records are inserted. If it is (U or D), records are updated. For all other values, records are rejected.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: Upd_W_EMPLOYEE_D_Ins_Upd

TRANSFORMFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Key to W_POSITION_DH table and used as a driver for securing data visibilty of this table.
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: VIS_PR_POSTN_DH_WID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Update Strategy Expression
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: IIF(UPDATE_FLG = 'I' OR UPDATE_FLG = 'B' OR UPDATE_FLG = 'S', DD_INSERT, IIF(UPDATE_FLG = 'D' OR UPDATE_FLG = 'U', DD_UPDATE, DD_REJECT))

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: This filter transformation prevents processing of records that have a UPDATE_FLG value of 'X'.

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: This expression transformation helps in customizing this mapping. If you are adding new columns to this mapping and you have special logic/treatment for your own columns, this expression transformation box acts as a placeholder for all your transformations. For example, if you are adding three new columns, you should pull them all the way from the Source Qualifier to the Filter directly (unless you need this for comparing as well, in which case you have to take it through the update flag transformation box as well). From the Filter, your columns go inside this custom transformation box where you can play around with these. After you're done, take the output
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: Exp_Custom

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: This cached lookup transformation is responsible for getting the required columns from the target table which is compared against the corresponding staging area columns to detect new records or identify changed records. The SQL statement of this lookup transformation is overridden with a join with the staging area table to minimize the amount of records to be cached by this lookup.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: Lkp_W_EMPLOYEE_D

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override

AUX2_CHANGED_ON_DT, TARGET_TABLE.AUX3_CHANGED_ON_DT as AUX3_CHANGED_ON_DT, TARGET_TABLE.AUX4_CHANGED_ON_DT as AUX4_CHANGED_ON_DT, TARGET_TABLE.FAX_PH_NUM as FAX_PH_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_PHONE as WORK_PHONE, TARGET_TABLE.PAGER_NUM as PAGER_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.MOBILE_NUM as MOBILE_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.EMAIL_ADDR as EMAIL_ADDR, TARGET_TABLE.SUPERVISOR_NUM as SUPERVISOR_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.SUPERVISOR_NAME as SUPERVISOR_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.HELD_POSTN as HELD_POSTN, TARGET_TABLE.JOB_TITLE as JOB_TITLE, TARGET_TABLE.LOGIN as LOGIN, TARGET_TABLE.NATIONALITY as NATIONALITY, TARGET_TABLE.APPR_AUTH as APPR_AUTH, TARGET_TABLE.HI_POT_IND as HI_POT_IND, TARGET_TABLE.EMP_FLG as EMP_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.EMP_ACTIVE_FLG as EMP_ACTIVE_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.AGENT_FLG as AGENT_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.USER_FLG as USER_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.ACCOUNT_REP_FLG as ACCOUNT_REP_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.SALES_REP_FLG as SALES_REP_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.PURCHASE_REP_FLG as PURCHASE_REP_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.CONTACT_REP_FLG as CONTACT_REP_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.SERVICE_REP_FLG as SERVICE_REP_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.BUYER_FLG as BUYER_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.REQUESTOR_FLG as REQUESTOR_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.APPLICANT_FLG as APPLICANT_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.ETL_PROC_WID as ETL_PROC_WID, TARGET_TABLE.W_INSERT_DT as W_INSERT_DT, TARGET_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT as EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT, TARGET_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT as EFFECTIVE_TO_DT, TARGET_TABLE.DELETE_FLG as DELETE_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.CURRENT_FLG as CURRENT_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID as INTEGRATION_ID, TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_FROM_DT as SRC_EFF_FROM_DT, TARGET_TABLE.JEG_HOME_NUM AS JEG_HOME_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.JEG_HOME_FAX_NUM AS JEG_HOME_FAX_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.JEG_HOME_SECONDARY_NUM AS JEG_HOME_SECONDARY_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.JEG_OTHER_NUM AS JEG_OTHER_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.JEG_PERSONAL_MOBILE_NUM AS JEG_PERSONAL_MOBILE_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.JEG_WORK_SECONDARY_NUM AS JEG_WORK_SECONDARY_NUM FROM W_EMPLOYEE_DS STAGE_TABLE, W_EMPLOYEE_D TARGET_TABLE WHERE( CASE WHEN TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_FROM_DT = $$LOW_DATE THEN 'Y' ELSE TARGET_TABLE.CURRENT_FLG END) = TARGET_TABLE.CURRENT_FLG AND STAGE_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = TARGET_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND STAGE_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID = TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID AND STAGE_TABLE.SRC_EFF_FROM_DT = TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_FROM_DT ORDER BY TARGET_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID, TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_FROM_DT --

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = IN_DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND INTEGRATION_ID = IN_INTEGRATION_ID AND SRC_EFF_FROM_DT = IN_SRC_EFF_FROM_DT

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION:
This expression transformation evaluates the value of the "Update Flag", a port which is used to take actions (like Insert/Update) downstream in the mapping. The possible values that an Update Flag may take are (I = Insert new record), (B = Insert new record and mark for soft delete), (U = Update existing record), (D = Update existing record and mark for soft delete) and (X = Reject). For more information on the evaluation logic, please see the description of the port "UPDATE_FLG".
For existing records, a given set of columns are compared to decide whether or not to update the record. If you wish to add more columns to this list, you can extend the compar
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: Exp_W_EMPLOYEE_D_Update_Flg

TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: TYPE2_COLS_DIFF

TRANSFORMFIELD.DESCRIPTION:
The update flag is evaluated using logic, the English description of which is as follows:
Basic Checks: If the current ETL Process Identifier is same as target record's ETL Process Identifier, then it is already loaded and hence no processing required (result X for Reject) - STOP.
Checks for new records (where target's ETL Process Identifier is NULL) : If stage delete flag = Y, then insert record and mark it for soft-delete (result B for insert with soft-delete) - STOP. If stage delete flag <> Y, insert into target (result I for Insert) - STOP.
Checks for existing records (where target's ETL Process Identifier is NOT NULL) : If stage delete flag
TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ETL_PROC_WID = LKP_ETL_PROC_WID, 'X', IIF(ISNULL(LKP_ETL_PROC_WID), IIF(DELETE_FLG = 'Y', 'B', 'I'), IIF(DELETE_FLG = 'Y', IIF(LKP_DELETE_FLG = 'Y', 'X', 'D'), IIF(LKP_CURRENT_FLG = 'N', IIF(SYSTEMS_COLS_DIFF = 'Y', 'U', 'U'), IIF(TYPE2_FLG = 'Y', IIF(TYPE2_COLS_DIFF = 'Y', 'U', IIF(SYSTEMS_COLS_DIFF = 'Y', 'U', 'U')), IIF(SYSTEMS_COLS_DIFF = 'Y', 'U', 'U'))))))
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: UPDATE_FLG

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: This Update Strategy transformation is the place where actions are taken based on the value of the Update Flag, whether to Insert or Update the record into the datawarehouse. If the Update Flag is (I or B or S), records are inserted. If it is (U or D), records are updated. For all other values, records are rejected.
INSTANCE.NAME: Upd_W_EMPLOYEE_D_Ins_Upd

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: This filter transformation prevents processing of records that have a UPDATE_FLG value of 'X'.
INSTANCE.NAME: Fil_W_EMPLOYEE_D

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: This expression transformation helps in customizing this mapping. If you are adding new columns to this mapping and you have special logic/treatment for your own columns, this expression transformation box acts as a placeholder for all your transformations. For example, if you are adding three new columns, you should pull them all the way from the Source Qualifier to the Filter directly (unless you need this for comparing as well, in which case you have to take it through the update flag transformation box as well). From the Filter, your columns go inside this custom transformation box where you can play around with these. After you're done, take the output
INSTANCE.NAME: Exp_Custom

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: This cached lookup transformation is responsible for getting the required columns from the target table which is compared against the corresponding staging area columns to detect new records or identify changed records. The SQL statement of this lookup transformation is overridden with a join with the staging area table to minimize the amount of records to be cached by this lookup.
INSTANCE.NAME: Lkp_W_EMPLOYEE_D

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION:
This expression transformation evaluates the value of the "Update Flag", a port which is used to take actions (like Insert/Update) downstream in the mapping. The possible values that an Update Flag may take are (I = Insert new record), (B = Insert new record and mark for soft delete), (U = Update existing record), (D = Update existing record and mark for soft delete) and (X = Reject). For more information on the evaluation logic, please see the description of the port "UPDATE_FLG".
For existing records, a given set of columns are compared to decide whether or not to update the record. If you wish to add more columns to this list, you can extend the compar
INSTANCE.NAME: Exp_W_EMPLOYEE_D_Update_Flg

METADATAEXTENSION.DESCRIPTION: The target data model version that this mapping is designed to load
METADATAEXTENSION.NAME: OLAP_Version

W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'STATE' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'E' ) WORK_STATE_CODE ON W_EMPLOYEE_DS.WORK_STATE_CODE=WORK_STATE_CODE.SOURCE_CODE AND W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID=WORK_STATE_CODE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN --added to fetch Work state name ( SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'STATE' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'E' ) WORK_STATE_CODE1 ON W_EMPLOYEE_DS.WORK_STATE_CODE=WORK_STATE_CODE1.MASTER_VALUE AND W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID=WORK_STATE_CODE1.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'COUNTRY' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'E' ) COUNTRY_CODE ON W_EMPLOYEE_DS.COUNTRY_CODE=COUNTRY_CODE.SOURCE_CODE AND W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID=COUNTRY_CODE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID left outer join--added to fetch country name (SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'COUNTRY' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'E' ) COUNTRY_CODE1 ON W_EMPLOYEE_DS.COUNTRY_CODE=COUNTRY_CODE1.MASTER_VALUE AND W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID=COUNTRY_CODE1.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'COUNTRY' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'E' ) MAIL_COUNTRY_CODE ON W_EMPLOYEE_DS.MAIL_COUNTRY_CODE=MAIL_COUNTRY_CODE.SOURCE_CODE AND W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID=MAIL_COUNTRY_CODE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID left outer join --added to fetch mail_country name (SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'COUNTRY' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'E' ) MAIL_COUNTRY_CODE1 ON W_EMPLOYEE_DS.MAIL_COUNTRY_CODE=MAIL_COUNTRY_CODE1.MASTER_VALUE AND W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID=MAIL_COUNTRY_CODE1.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'COUNTRY' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'E' ) WORK_COUNTRY_CODE ON W_EMPLOYEE_DS.WORK_COUNTRY_CODE=WORK_COUNTRY_CODE.SOURCE_CODE AND W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID=WORK_COUNTRY_CODE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN----added to fetch work_country name ( SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'COUNTRY' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'E' ) WORK_COUNTRY_CODE1 ON W_EMPLOYEE_DS.WORK_COUNTRY_CODE=WORK_COUNTRY_CODE1.MASTER_VALUE AND W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID=WORK_COUNTRY_CODE1.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'LANGUAGE' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'E' ) NATIVE_LANG_CODE ON W_EMPLOYEE_DS.NATIVE_LANG_CODE=NATIVE_LANG_CODE.SOURCE_CODE AND W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID=NATIVE_LANG_CODE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'LANGUAGE' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'E' ) SEC_FLU_LANG_CODE ON W_EMPLOYEE_DS.SEC_FLU_LANG_CODE=SEC_FLU_LANG_CODE.SOURCE_CODE AND W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID=SEC_FLU_LANG_CODE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'LANGUAGE' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'E' ) THR_FLU_LANG_CODE ON W_EMPLOYEE_DS.THR_FLU_LANG_CODE=THR_FLU_LANG_CODE.SOURCE_CODE AND W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID=THR_FLU_LANG_CODE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'MARITAL_STATUS' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'E') MARITAL_STAT_CODE ON W_EMPLOYEE_DS.MARITAL_STAT_CODE=MARITAL_STAT_CODE.SOURCE_CODE AND W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID=MARITAL_STAT_CODE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'NATIONAL_ID_TYPE' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'E') NATNL_ID_TYPE_CODE ON W_EMPLOYEE_DS.NATNL_ID_TYPE_CODE=NATNL_ID_TYPE_CODE.SOURCE_CODE AND W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID=NATNL_ID_TYPE_CODE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'HIGHEST_DEGREE' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'E') HIEST_EDU_DEG_CODE ON W_EMPLOYEE_DS.HIEST_EDU_DEG_CODE=HIEST_EDU_DEG_CODE.SOURCE_CODE AND W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID=HIEST_EDU_DEG_CODE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'APPROVAL_AUTH_CATEGORY' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'E') APPR_AUTH_CAT_CODE ON W_EMPLOYEE_DS.APPR_AUTH_CAT_CODE=APPR_AUTH_CAT_CODE.SOURCE_CODE AND W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID=APPR_AUTH_CAT_CODE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'WORK_PERMIT_TYPE' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'E') WRK_PERM_TYPE_CODE ON W_EMPLOYEE_DS.WRK_PERM_TYPE_CODE=WRK_PERM_TYPE_CODE.SOURCE_CODE AND W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID=WRK_PERM_TYPE_CODE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'CITIZENSHIP_STATUS' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'E') CITIZENSHIP_STATUS_CODE ON W_EMPLOYEE_DS.CITIZENSHIP_STATUS_CODE=CITIZENSHIP_STATUS_CODE.SOURCE_CODE AND W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID=CITIZENSHIP_STATUS_CODE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'EDUCATION_BACKGROUND' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'E') EDUCATION_BCKGND_CODE ON W_EMPLOYEE_DS.EDUCATION_BCKGND_CODE=EDUCATION_BCKGND_CODE.SOURCE_CODE AND W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID=EDUCATION_BCKGND_CODE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'DEPARTMENT' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'E') DEPARTMENT_CODE ON W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DEPARTMENT_CODE=DEPARTMENT_CODE.SOURCE_CODE AND W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID=DEPARTMENT_CODE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'POSITION_TYPE' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'E') POSITION_TYPE_CODE ON W_EMPLOYEE_DS.POSITION_TYPE_CODE=POSITION_TYPE_CODE.SOURCE_CODE AND W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID=POSITION_TYPE_CODE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'DISABILITY' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'E') DISABILITY_CODE ON W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DISABILITY_CODE=DISABILITY_CODE.SOURCE_CODE AND W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID=DISABILITY_CODE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'RELIGION' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'E') RELIGION_CODE ON W_EMPLOYEE_DS.RELIGION_CODE=RELIGION_CODE.SOURCE_CODE AND W_EMPLOYEE_DS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID=RELIGION_CODE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID --WHERE W_EMPLOYEE_DS.INTEGRATION_ID = '2466905'

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT TARGET_TABLE.ROW_WID as ROW_WID, TARGET_TABLE.CHANGED_ON_DT as CHANGED_ON_DT, TARGET_TABLE.AUX1_CHANGED_ON_DT as AUX1_CHANGED_ON_DT, TARGET_TABLE.AUX2_CHANGED_ON_DT as AUX2_CHANGED_ON_DT, TARGET_TABLE.AUX3_CHANGED_ON_DT as AUX3_CHANGED_ON_DT, TARGET_TABLE.AUX4_CHANGED_ON_DT as AUX4_CHANGED_ON_DT, TARGET_TABLE.FAX_PH_NUM as FAX_PH_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_PHONE as WORK_PHONE, TARGET_TABLE.PAGER_NUM as PAGER_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.MOBILE_NUM as MOBILE_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.EMAIL_ADDR as EMAIL_ADDR, TARGET_TABLE.SUPERVISOR_NUM as SUPERVISOR_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.SUPERVISOR_NAME as SUPERVISOR_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.HELD_POSTN as HELD_POSTN, TARGET_TABLE.JOB_TITLE as JOB_TITLE, TARGET_TABLE.LOGIN as LOGIN, TARGET_TABLE.NATIONALITY as NATIONALITY, TARGET_TABLE.APPR_AUTH as APPR_AUTH, TARGET_TABLE.HI_POT_IND as HI_POT_IND, TARGET_TABLE.EMP_FLG as EMP_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.EMP_ACTIVE_FLG as EMP_ACTIVE_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.AGENT_FLG as AGENT_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.USER_FLG as USER_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.ACCOUNT_REP_FLG as ACCOUNT_REP_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.SALES_REP_FLG as SALES_REP_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.PURCHASE_REP_FLG as PURCHASE_REP_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.CONTACT_REP_FLG as CONTACT_REP_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.SERVICE_REP_FLG as SERVICE_REP_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.BUYER_FLG as BUYER_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.REQUESTOR_FLG as REQUESTOR_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.APPLICANT_FLG as APPLICANT_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.ETL_PROC_WID as ETL_PROC_WID, TARGET_TABLE.W_INSERT_DT as W_INSERT_DT, TARGET_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT as EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT, TARGET_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT as EFFECTIVE_TO_DT, TARGET_TABLE.DELETE_FLG as DELETE_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.CURRENT_FLG as CURRENT_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID as INTEGRATION_ID, TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_FROM_DT as SRC_EFF_FROM_DT, TARGET_TABLE.JEG_HOME_NUM AS JEG_HOME_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.JEG_HOME_FAX_NUM AS JEG_HOME_FAX_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.JEG_HOME_SECONDARY_NUM AS JEG_HOME_SECONDARY_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.JEG_OTHER_NUM AS JEG_OTHER_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.JEG_PERSONAL_MOBILE_NUM AS JEG_PERSONAL_MOBILE_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.JEG_WORK_SECONDARY_NUM AS JEG_WORK_SECONDARY_NUM FROM W_EMPLOYEE_DS STAGE_TABLE, W_EMPLOYEE_D TARGET_TABLE WHERE( CASE WHEN TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_FROM_DT = $$LOW_DATE THEN 'Y' ELSE TARGET_TABLE.CURRENT_FLG END) = TARGET_TABLE.CURRENT_FLG AND TARGET_TABLE.DELETE_FLG = 'N' AND STAGE_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = TARGET_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND STAGE_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID = TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID AND STAGE_TABLE.SRC_EFF_FROM_DT = TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_FROM_DT ORDER BY TARGET_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID, TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_FROM_DT, TARGET_TABLE.CURRENT_FLG--
